title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.040 - Referees to be disinterested parties
text:
515.040.  Referees to be disinterested parties. — No person shall be appointed referee who is of kin to either party, or is interested in the event of the action.
(RSMo 1939 § 1145) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 979; 1919 § 1429; 1909 § 1999
